ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heap_dumps" (
  "heap_dump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heap dump */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the heap dump belongs to */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the heap dump was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the heap dump */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the heap dump in MB */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the heap dump */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Current status of the heap dump analysis */,
  "analysis_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis started */,
  "analysis_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis completed */,
  "analysis_result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the analysis result file */,
  "analysis_result_file_size" REAL /* Size of the analysis result file in MB */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heap_dump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heap_dumps_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heap_dumps_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "last_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the last heap dump analysis for the project */,
  "total_heap_dumps_uploaded" INTEGER /* Total number of heap dumps uploaded for the project */,
  "total_memory_leaks_detected" INTEGER /* Total number of memory leaks detected in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_leaks" (
  "leak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory leak */,
  "heap_dump_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the heap dump where the leak was detected */,
  "class_simple_name" TEXT /* Simple name of the class causing the leak */,
  "leak_trace_index" INTEGER /* Index of the leak trace in the heap dump */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leak */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the leak was marked as resolved */,
  "resolver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the leak */,
  "leak_type" TEXT /* Type of the memory leak */,
  "leak_size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory leak in bytes */,
  "leak_root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the memory leak */,
  "leak_detected_date" TEXT /* Date the memory leak was first detected */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the memory leak status was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_leaks_resolver_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_leaks_heap_dump_id FOREIGN KEY ("heap_dump_id") REFERENCES heap_dumps ("heap_dump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leak_traces" (
  "trace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trace step */,
  "leak_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory leak the trace belongs to */,
  "trace_step" INTEGER /* Step number in the leak trace */,
  "trace_description" TEXT /* Description of the trace step */,
  "trace_line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the trace step occurs */,
  "leak_trace_type" TEXT /* Type of the trace step */,
  "leak_trace_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trace step in milliseconds */,
  "leak_trace_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage at the trace step in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leak_traces_leak_id FOREIGN KEY ("leak_id") REFERENCES memory_leaks ("leak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the user is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "leak_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory leak the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the comment is related to a resolution */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_leak_id FOREIGN KEY ("leak_id") REFERENCES memory_leaks ("leak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "total_memory_leaks_reported" INTEGER /* Total number of memory leaks reported in the report */,
  "total_fixed_leaks" INTEGER /* Total number of fixed leaks reported in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
